title: How Spotify runs agents across 20M+ lines of code, with Niklas Gustavsson
summary: Spotify uses Claude agents to automatically build prototypes from natural language descriptions across their 20M+ line codebase. VP of Engineering Niklas Gustavsson discussed the deployment of Claude Cowork and Claude Code for rapid prototyping and development.
writeup: This conversation with Spotify VP of Engineering Niklas Gustavsson covers how the company runs Claude agents across a codebase exceeding 20 million lines. The agents build prototypes automatically from natural language descriptions, with Claude Cowork and Claude Code deployed for rapid prototyping and development. The discussion matters as a concrete account of agent use at scale inside a large engineering organization rather than a small demo. The takeaway: agents operate as a path from plain-language specification to working prototype within an existing large codebase.
